purpose: Initializes the program by accepting current date values and opening input files INFILE1 and INFILE2, checking for any open errors.
Reads a record from INFILE1 and moves it to the pending authorization summary if successful, or sets the end-of-file flag if no more records are available.
Reads a record from INFILE2, validates the root segment key, and populates child segment data for insertion if the record is valid.
Closes both input files INFILE1 and INFILE2 and displays error messages if either file fails to close.
Terminates the program abnormally by setting the return code to 16 and displaying an abend message.
Abends the program with return code 16 when an input file fails to open.
Inserts a root segment into the IMS database using the data read from INFILE1.
Abends the program if the root segment insertion fails with an unexpected IMS status code.
Inserts a child segment into the IMS database after validating the root segment key and moving data from the input record.
Performs an IMS insert call to add a child segment under the retrieved parent segment.
Abends the program with return code 16 when the GU call to the root segment fails unexpectedly.
Abends the program with return code 16 when the ISRT call for the child segment fails unexpectedly.
